name: Ship Bugbook as standalone .app binary
note: Complex build system work — needs xcode project investigation, GhosttyKit resolution, signing. Claude agent better suited.

name: Gateway redesign
note: Has full design spec in Bugbook. Progressive disclosure, greeting+date, quick nav, todays focus, recent activity.

name: Rename Meetings → Meetings
note: Simple rename. Sidebar + view title → Meetings. Keep chat button.

name: Callout block fix
note: Remove left border. Just rounded gray bg + icon. Match TOC styling.

name: Outline/TOC fix
note: Grey text links not bullets/stars. Match callout container. Click scrolls to heading.

name: Heading toggles behavior
note: Complex: Cmd+Shift+Enter toggle, Enter exits, auto-nest smaller headings. Needs multi-file reasoning.

name: TableBlockView fix
note: Attempt 3. Fix grip dots duplication, alignment, flush with content area.

name: Kebab menu fix
note: Larger hit area, popover positioning beside not on top.

name: Chat redesign
note: Rename Ask AI → Chat, remove X, Cmd+I opens sidebar panel.

name: Mention picker link styling
note: Style @[[Page Name]] as visible link (pill or colored text), clickable.

name: Cmd+K search navigation fix
note: Attempt 3. navigateToEntryInPane works from sidebar but not command palette. Deep nav system issue.
